/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/program-changer.dir/main.cpp.o" -o program-changer
